item.title: Relatives of 10 scientists who died or vanished grapple with impact of wild speculation
item.description: Conspiracies are running rampant online after the deaths or disappearances of at least 10 people tied to sensitive US research.

item.title: US justice department drops probe into Fed chairman Jerome Powell
item.description: President Donald Trump had accused Powell of improper cost overruns in renovating the Fed's building.

item.title: Why is this game only legal across Australia one day a year?
item.description: Two-up is a coin toss betting game that was played by Australian soldiers during World War One - it’s now only legal across Australia on 25 April.

item.title: No 10 says Falklands sovereignty rests with UK after report of US 'review'
item.description: An internal Pentagon document reportedly raised the prospect of a change in position in retaliation for the UK not joining the Iran war.

item.title: South Africa's top envoy to Ghana summoned over attacks on foreigners
item.description: A Ghanaian national was confronted by South Africans in a viral clip and questioned about his immigration status.
